_meta.build: round-12 retrofit (post lane A/B/C + viewmodel fix)
_meta.suite: game/tests/suite.js — 71 assertions, all green at creation (SUITE PASS 71/71, world_hash 911b6032)
_meta.conventions: suite_covered=false means judge/probe/human territory (aesthetic, real-input, render-quality, or wall-clock items). passes reflects the latest verified status: suite result where suite_covered, else the most recent panel/probe/human-checkpoint evidence. verified_round is the crediting round; rounds 1-8 backfills are best-effort from panel history.
_meta.ratchet: entries are append-only; passes may flip on evidence; desc/suite_covered edits need owner approval (see tests/README.md)
